title: CyberArk PAM zero-day exploited to steal privileged credentials
rssSummary: Attackers are actively exploiting a zero-day in CyberArk Privileged Access Manager; an emergency patch is available.

title: Zscaler Internet Access flaw allows authentication bypass
rssSummary: Researchers detail an authentication bypass affecting ZIA tenants; Zscaler has released a fix.

title: CISA adds Microsoft Exchange CVE-2026-23456 to Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog
rssSummary: Agencies must remediate the known exploited Microsoft Exchange vulnerability.

title: Zscaler beats revenue expectations on strong enterprise demand
rssSummary: The company raised guidance; analysts focus on product launch momentum.
